cmd:
python3 -c "
import re, subprocess, os
t = re.search(r'GH_TOKEN = .([^.]+).', open('/root/agent/relay.py').read()).group(1)
os.system('rm -rf /root/My-AI-FB-target')
r = subprocess.run(['git','clone',f'https://{t}@github.com/AleksandrovnaIrina/My-AI-FB-target.git','/root/My-AI-FB-target'], capture_output=True, text=True)
print(r.stdout + r.stderr)
import os; print(str(os.listdir('/root/My-AI-FB-target')))
"
